best_prompt: Analyze the two sentences carefully. The standard English adjective order is: opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose. Determine which one uses the correct order of adjectives according to English conventions. Choose the correct sentence by responding with only (A) or (B).

features.name: guideline_placement
features.description: 1 if the standard English adjective order guideline is presented early in the prompt (before the task instruction), 0 otherwise. This feature affects performance because presenting the guideline first primes the AI with the necessary rule before it is asked to apply it, improving recall and accuracy.

features.name: task_frame_clarity
features.description: 1 if the prompt explicitly states that the task involves comparing two sentences that differ only in adjective ordering, 0 otherwise. This feature affects performance because framing the task clearly helps the AI focus on the specific comparison required, reducing ambiguity and improving accuracy.

features.name: rule_repetition
features.description: 1 if the prompt explicitly repeats the adjective order rule in proximity to the task instruction, 0 otherwise. This feature affects performance because repeating the rule near the task reinforces the rule in the AI's working memory, reducing the chance of forgetting or misapplying it during the decision-making process.
